  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"cancel (v3)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/rest/financing/v3/applications/{uuid}/cancel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.cancel</b> authority for authenticated user

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"uuid","in":"path","description":"uuid","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customReason":{"type":"string","description":"Specification of APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER reason"},"reason":{"type":"string","description":"Reason of cancellation. Considered as APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER if not set.","enum":["APPLICATION_CANCELLED_CARRIER_CHANGED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_CART_CONTENT_CHANGED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_ERP","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_EXPIRED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_UNFINISHED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_UNFINISHED_REGISTRATION","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_UNSUCCESSFUL_CLIENT_VERIFICATION","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_UNSUCCESSFUL_SMS_SIGNATURE","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_ESHOP_RULES","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER"]}},"title":"FinancingV3ApplicationCancelRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK"},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
